# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Currently, only the latest release of PathFinderAI receives active security updates.

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| > 0.1.0 | :white_check_mark: |
| < 0.1.0 | :x:                |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Security is taken very seriously. If you discover a security vulnerability within PathFinderAI, please **do not** open a public issue. 

Instead, please send an email directly to the project maintainer. You can find the contact information on the GitHub profile of the repository owner.

We will endeavor to respond to your report within 48 hours and provide a timeline for a fix. Please refrain from publicly disclosing the vulnerability until a patch has been released.
